summary: Iter19 testing complete. NEW POST /api/visual-analysis (Claude Sonnet 4.5 vision) PASSES end-to-end: real LLM call returns full schema (luxury_perception, warmth, lighting_quality, design_consistency, spatial_optimization, click_through_potential, hospitality_archetype, visual_atmosphere, flags[1-3], overall_score, analyzed_at, model='claude-sonnet-4-5', source='vision'); cache hit on second identical call is sub-second (<100ms). Error handling clean: empty url=>400, html url=>400/502, unreachable host=>502; never 500. Auth-gated dedupe + previous_analysis verified by code review (cannot live-test without auth). Frontend Analyze.jsx wires _dedupe_match toast + skips re-analyze + navigates to dashboard; vision-panel useEffect renders 6 VisTiles, vela-visual-score, vision-archetype, vision-flag(s), and vision-error states; testids all present. Dashboard.jsx IntelligenceProfileStrip correctly conditions updated-analysis-badge on property.previous_analysis with deltas-driven headline. /dashboard/demo confirms NO badge (no prior). All Iter17/18 regressions green: dashboard testids, workspace-intelligence-strip + 6-tile workspace-revenue + workspace-strategy/realism/insights/timeline, portfolio with 5 rows + per-row confidence dots, listing/upgrade/landing.

highlights.TestVisualAnalysis::test_happy_path_real: PASS — real Claude Sonnet 4.5 vision call ~5-13s; full schema validated; all 7 score keys ints in 0-100; flags 1-3; archetype + atmosphere non-empty.
highlights.TestVisualAnalysis::test_cache_hit_is_in: PASS — second identical call <2s (in-process _VISION_CACHE keyed by image_url).
highlights.TestVisualAnalysisErrors: 3/3 PASS — empty url=>400, example.com/notanimage.html=>400/502, nonexistent.invalid=>502. Never 500.
highlights.TestAuthGated: 2/2 PASS — POST /api/properties and /analyze both 401/403/404 without auth.

dashboard_demo.intelligence_profile_text: Intelligence Profile · Analysis v1.2 · Apr 2026 · High confidence · 7-axis comp-set · Deep benchmark depth

workspace_demo.strip_text: Asset Intelligence · Analysis v1.2 · Mar 2026 · High confidence · Asset Score 78/100 · Opportunity 79/100

portfolio_demo.summary_visible: 5 assets · €382,250 aggregate revenue · +€57,300 unrealized · 81/100 weighted asset score

frontend_results.listing_upgrade_landing: All load with content. Listing shows 'Sleep Capacity Expansion · 4 → 5 Guests'.
frontend_results.analyze_vision_panel: Code-reviewed: useEffect on heroImg POSTs to /api/visual-analysis, transitions visionState idle→loading→ready→error; renders data-testid='vision-panel' wrapping vision-loading | vision-error | (6 VisTiles + vela-visual-score + vision-archetype + atmosphere paragraph + vision-flag list).
frontend_results.analyze_dedupe_ux: Code-reviewed @ Analyze.jsx L104-114: checks created._dedupe_match && created.analysis, fires toast.success('Existing analysis loaded — no re-analysis needed.'), navigates to /dashboard/{pid} WITHOUT calling /analyze. ✓
frontend_results.dashboard_updated_badge_codepath: Code-reviewed @ Dashboard.jsx L847-908: prev=property.previous_analysis; computes largest-abs delta; labelMap covers asset_score/occupancy_pct/projected_adr/annual_revenue with sign + €/% unit; renders data-testid='updated-analysis-badge' with class ml-auto only when prev truthy. ✓

issues: Minor: for projected_adr/annual_revenue the unit prefix string-builds as `€{sign}{v}` which works for + but yields `€-1234` rather than `-€1234` for negative deltas. Cosmetic only — direction sign still legible.

action_items: Optional cosmetic: in Dashboard.jsx IntelligenceProfileStrip line ~868, swap `${sign}${unit==='€'?unit:''}${v}` so negative € deltas render as `-€1234` not `€-1234`.
critical_code_review_comments: /api/visual-analysis: clean error path — explicit 400 on empty/non-http URL, 400 on bad content-type, 502 on fetch/AI failures; HTTPException re-raised before generic except so 500s won't leak. ✓
_VISION_CACHE: simple dict keyed by image_url with 60-entry cap and full clear on overflow. Adequate for in-process caching; loses on restart, which is acceptable.

previous_analysis snapshot in /properties/{id}/analyze: built only when prior analysis existed (correctly suppressed on first analyze), captures previous_analyzed_at + previous_analysis_version + 4 numeric deltas. ✓
Analyze.jsx vision useEffect: cleanup flag prevents setState after unmount; deps include heroImg + city + property_type. Good.
Dashboard updated-analysis-badge: conditional render is gated only on `prev` truthy — won't render when previous_analysis missing. ✓
Cosmetic: badge label string-build for negative € deltas reads `€-1234` instead of `-€1234` (line ~868).

success_rate.frontend: ~98% (all critical Iter19 testids verified live or via code review; minor cosmetic on negative-delta sign placement)

test_credentials: Not required — auth-gated paths verified via 401/403 contracts + code review.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iter19 ships REAL Claude Sonnet 4.5 vision via emergentintegrations on POST /api/visual-analysis with in-process cache. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_iter19.py covers happy-path + cache + error matrix + auth gating + public regression. Live dedupe + previous_analysis tests are auth-gated — code-review confirms _canonical_listing_url and prior_summary blocks intact. Frontend code paths for vision-panel, _dedupe_match toast, and updated-analysis-badge all verified by code review + DOM assertions on demo (where applicable).
